---
title: "Keyboard shortcuts"
---

Shortcuts depend on where focus is: source text, codebook, or search.

## Source text

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `1` to `9`, `0`, `a` to `y` | Apply visible codes |
| `Up` / `Down` | Move between sentences |
| `Shift+Left` / `Shift+Right` | Move between sources |
| `Q` | Repeat the last code |
| `Z` or `Command+Z` | Undo |
| `Command+Shift+Z` | Redo |
| `X` | Delete annotation |
| `Shift+F` | Toggle flag |
| `N` | Open, edit, or close source notes |
| `V` | Review coded text for the focused code |
| `Right` | Move focus to applied codes |
| `]` | Open or collapse the applied-codes inspector |
| `/` | Search codes |
| `Tab` | Cycle between coding zones |

## Applied codes

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `Up` / `Down` | Move through applied codes |
| `Up` from the first code | Move to the collapse button |
| `Enter` / `Space` on the collapse button | Collapse the applied-codes inspector |
| `Enter` / `Space` on the collapsed rail | Reopen the applied-codes inspector |
| `Left` / `Esc` | Return focus to source text |
| `Delete` / `Backspace` | Delete the focused annotation |

## Codebook

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `Option+Right` | Move focused code into the folder above |
| `Option+Shift+Right` | Create a folder from the focused code and code above |
| `Option+Left` | Move focused code out to the root |
| `Option+Shift+Up` / `Option+Shift+Down` | Reorder folder rows |
| `Command+X` | Cut code |
| `Command+V` | Paste code |
| `F2` | Rename |
| `Delete` / `Backspace` | Soft-delete |
| `Esc` | Clear cut, clear search, or return focus to source |

## Search

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `/` | Open search |
| `Enter` | Apply the selected code or create a code when shown |
| `Shift+Enter` | Create a folder when shown |
| `Esc` | Clear search or return to source |

## Tip

Use the shortcuts shown inside ACE first. Use this page as a reference when you need the full list.

## Review coded text

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `V` | Return to coding |
| `Left` / `Right` | Move between codebook, source tracks, and excerpts |
| `Up` / `Down` | Move through codes, tracks, or excerpts |
| `Space` | Pin or unpin a source track |
| `Shift+Up` / `Shift+Down` | Range-select source tracks |
| `Command+A` / `Control+A` | Pin all source tracks |
| `/` | Search the codebook |
| `?` | Open the in-app shortcut sheet |
